tldr_zh: AI安全漏洞與企業導入挑戰浮現，Google AI搜尋引發用戶反彈，同時地緣政治衝突持續升級。
tldr_en: AI security flaws and enterprise adoption challenges emerge, Google's AI search faces user backlash, while geopolitical conflicts escalate.

items.title_zh: 開源套件「Starlette」驚現關鍵漏洞，數百萬AI代理恐受影響
items.title_en: Critical Vulnerability Found in Open Source Package "Starlette," Potentially Affecting Millions of AI Agents
items.summary_zh: 開源軟體套件Starlette被發現存在名為「BadHost」的關鍵漏洞，該套件每週下載量高達3.25億次，恐使數百萬個AI代理面臨資安風險。此漏洞凸顯了AI基礎設施中開源元件的安全挑戰，可能對廣泛部署的AI系統造成嚴重影響。
items.summary_en: A critical vulnerability named "BadHost" has been discovered in the open-source software package Starlette, which has 325 million weekly downloads, potentially endangering millions of AI agents. This highlights the security challenges within AI infrastructure's open-source components and could severely impact widely deployed AI systems.

items.title_zh: 用戶反彈Google AI搜尋，DuckDuckGo安裝量激增三成
items.title_en: DuckDuckGo Installs Soar 30% as Users Reject Google's AI Search
items.summary_zh: Google在I/O 2026大會上大幅改革搜尋功能，以AI代理取代傳統藍色連結，引發用戶強烈反彈。許多用戶不滿被「強迫接受」AI搜尋結果，導致隱私導向的搜尋引擎DuckDuckGo應用程式安裝量激增30%。
items.summary_en: Google's significant overhaul of its search function at I/O 2026, replacing traditional blue links with AI agents, has sparked a strong user backlash. Many users are rejecting being "force-fed" AI search results, leading to a 30% surge in installations of the privacy-focused search engine DuckDuckGo.

items.title_zh: OpenRouter估值一年內翻倍突破13億美元，顯示多AI模型未來趨勢
items.title_en: OpenRouter's Valuation Doubles to Over $1.3 Billion in a Year, Signaling Multi-AI Model Future
items.summary_zh: AI模型路由器OpenRouter在一年內估值翻倍至13億美元，並完成1.13億美元的B輪融資。其六個月內使用量成長五倍，顯示市場對整合多種AI模型的服務需求強勁，預示著多AI模型共存的未來已來。
items.summary_en: AI model router OpenRouter has seen its valuation double to $1.3 billion within a year, securing a $113 million Series B funding round. Its 5x growth in usage over six months indicates strong market demand for services integrating multiple AI models, signaling the arrival of a multi-AI model future.

items.title_zh: 企業AI代理導入面臨挑戰，八成組織準備不足難以實現目標
items.title_en: Enterprise AI Agent Adoption Faces Challenges, 80% of Organizations Unprepared to Meet Goals
items.summary_zh: 儘管85%的企業希望在三年內實現AI代理化，但76%的組織坦承其現有營運和基礎設施無法支持這項轉變。主要障礙在於人員、流程和工作流程的準備不足，凸顯了企業在AI雄心與實際執行間的巨大落差。
items.summary_en: While 85% of organizations aim to become agentic within three years, 76% admit their current operations and infrastructure cannot support this change. The primary hurdles are a lack of readiness across people, processes, and workflows, highlighting a significant disconnect between enterprise AI ambitions and practical execution.

items.title_zh: 駭客濫用Google廣告與Claude.ai散布惡意程式，鎖定macOS用戶
items.title_en: Hackers Exploit Google Ads and Claude.ai to Distribute Malware to macOS Users
items.summary_zh: 駭客正利用Google廣告將用戶引導至偽造網站，並濫用Claude.ai的對話分享頁面，向搜尋特定軟體的macOS用戶散布惡意程式。此攻擊手法顯示網路犯罪分子正利用主流平台和AI工具，進行更具針對性的惡意軟體傳播。
items.summary_en: Hackers are leveraging Google ads to redirect users to fake websites and exploiting Claude.ai's conversation sharing pages to distribute malware to macOS users searching for specific software. This attack method demonstrates how cybercriminals are utilizing mainstream platforms and AI tools for more targeted malware dissemination.

items.title_zh: NASA公布月球基地建設計畫，將部署登陸器、月球車與無人機
items.title_en: NASA Unveils Moon Base Construction Plans, Deploying Landers, Rovers, and Drones
items.summary_zh: 美國太空總署（NASA）公布了其永久月球基地的建設計畫，包括今年將啟動的三項關鍵任務。這些任務將部署跳躍式無人機和月球車，為2028年的載人登月任務鋪路，並為未來在月球南極建立人類前哨站奠定基礎。
items.summary_en: NASA has unveiled its plans for a permanent Moon base, including three key missions set to launch this year. These missions will deploy hopping drones and roving vehicles, paving the way for the crewed Artemis landing in 2028 and laying the groundwork for a future human outpost at the lunar South Pole.

items.title_zh: 美國航空簽約Starlink，逾500架飛機將導入SpaceX衛星網路
items.title_en: American Airlines Signs Starlink Deal, Over 500 Aircraft to Integrate SpaceX Satellite Internet
items.summary_zh: 美國航空宣布將在超過500架空中巴士A321XLR和A321neo飛機上安裝SpaceX的Starlink衛星網路服務。這項合作預計於2027年第一季度開始部署，是Starlink繼IPO後再次取得重大商業成功，進一步擴展其在航空領域的市場。
items.summary_en: American Airlines announced plans to install SpaceX's Starlink satellite internet service on over 500 of its Airbus A321XLR and A321neo aircraft. This partnership, set to begin deployment in Q1 2027, marks another significant commercial success for Starlink post-IPO, further expanding its presence in the aviation sector.

items.title_zh: 蘋果發布新密碼學程式庫，內建兩種量子安全演算法與形式驗證工具
items.title_en: Apple Releases New Cryptography Library with Two Quantum-Safe Algorithms and Formal Verification Tools
items.summary_zh: 蘋果發布了新的基礎密碼學程式庫corecrypto，其中實作了ML-KEM和ML-DSA兩種量子安全演算法。該公司同時推出數學證明，確保這些演算法符合美國聯邦資訊處理標準FIPS 203與FIPS 204，為未來抗量子密碼學奠定基礎。
items.summary_en: Apple has released its new corecrypto foundational cryptography library, implementing two quantum-safe algorithms: ML-KEM and ML-DSA. The company also provided mathematical proofs to ensure these algorithms comply with U.S. Federal Information Processing Standards FIPS 203 and FIPS 204, laying the groundwork for future post-quantum cryptography.

items.title_zh: 臺灣市占第一EVERY8D簡訊平臺遭駭，F-ISAC發布黃燈級資安警訊
items.title_en: Taiwan's Top SMS Platform EVERY8D Hacked, F-ISAC Issues Yellow-Level Cybersecurity Alert
items.summary_zh: 臺灣市占第一的企業簡訊平臺EVERY8D疑似遭受嚴重網路攻擊與勒索軟體侵害，導致服務全面癱瘓。由於該平臺是臺灣銀行、電商及政府機關OTP認證的關鍵基礎設施，每月發送逾億封簡訊，此次事件已引發F-ISAC發布黃燈級資安警訊。
items.summary_en: Taiwan's leading enterprise SMS platform, EVERY8D, has reportedly suffered a severe cyberattack and ransomware infection, leading to a complete service outage. As the platform is critical infrastructure for OTP authentication for Taiwanese banks, e-commerce, and government agencies, sending over 100 million messages monthly, the incident has prompted F-ISAC to issue a yellow-level cybersecurity alert.

items.title_zh: 美伊戰爭致SpaceX星鏈漲價，五角大廈被迫為軍事用途支付更高費用
items.title_en: SpaceX Starlink Price Hike in US-Iran Conflict Forces Pentagon to Pay More for Military Use
items.summary_zh: 隨著SpaceX的星鏈網路在美伊戰爭中被美國自殺式無人機廣泛使用並取得戰果，SpaceX高層決定調漲其衛星Wi-Fi網路的軍事使用費用。這項漲價迫使五角大廈為其關鍵的軍事通訊服務支付更高成本，凸顯了商業科技在衝突中的戰略價值與成本考量。
items.summary_en: As SpaceX's Starlink network has been widely used by U.S. suicide drones in the US-Iran conflict, achieving significant results, SpaceX executives have decided to increase the price for military use of its satellite Wi-Fi network. This price hike forces the Pentagon to pay higher costs for its critical military communication services, highlighting the strategic value and cost considerations of commercial technology in conflicts.

items.title_zh: 美伊衝突升級：伊朗指控美國違反停火協議並擊落美軍無人機
items.title_en: US-Iran Conflict Escalates: Iran Accuses US of Ceasefire Violation and Downing US Drone
items.summary_zh: 伊朗外交部指控美國在過去48小時內違反脆弱的停火協議，對伊朗南部發動空襲，並怒批美軍為恐怖主義軍隊。伊朗伊斯蘭革命衛隊更聲稱擊落一架美國MQ-9死神無人機，顯示兩國之間的緊張局勢正急劇升級。
items.summary_en: Iran's Foreign Ministry accused the U.S. of violating a fragile ceasefire with airstrikes in southern Iran over the past 48 hours, condemning the U.S. military as a terrorist force. The Iranian Revolutionary Guard Corps further claimed to have shot down a U.S. MQ-9 Reaper drone, indicating a sharp escalation in tensions between the two nations.

items.title_zh: 以色列加強空襲黎巴嫩，數十人死亡衝突持續升級
items.title_en: Israel Intensifies Strikes on Lebanon, Dozens Killed as Conflict Escalates
items.summary_zh: 以色列總理納坦雅胡誓言「粉碎」真主黨後，以色列對黎巴嫩境內約100個真主黨基礎設施和戰士目標發動了密集空襲。此次行動導致數十人死亡，標誌著以色列與黎巴嫩邊境衝突的進一步升級，加劇了地區緊張局勢。
items.summary_en: Following Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu's vow to "crush" Hezbollah, Israel launched intensive airstrikes targeting approximately 100 Hezbollah infrastructure sites and fighters in Lebanon. The operation resulted in dozens of deaths, marking a further escalation of the conflict along the Israel-Lebanon border and exacerbating regional tensions.
